messages.content:
CHỌN ĐÁP ÁN ĐÚNG
Question 13
My sister can’t swim_______she’s afraid of water.
A.
because
B.
so
C.
but
D.
and
C. but

Question 14
Who _____________the garden when you are away?
A.
will look at
B.
looked after
C.
will look after
D.
looked at
C. will look after

Question 15
Construction crews have torn up the town's main road _______find that the underground water system is in the way of their plans.
A.
in order that
B.
so as
C.
even though
D.
only to
D. only to

Question 16
Four of the hotel's executive suites have been_______for traveling diplomats who are on overseas assignments.
A.
reserved
B.
remained
C.
placed
D.
collected
A. reserved

Question 17
They are very _____________about their volunteer program.
A.
exciting
B.
excite
C.
excitement
D.
excited
D. excited

Question 18
_______you need any help? Yes. That’s very kind of you.
A.
Could
B.
Can
C.
Do
D.
May
A. Could

Question 19
It’s possible ________ a train across Canada.
A.
to be taken
B.
take
C.
to take
D.
taking
C. to take

Question 20
The Mekong River is__________river in the world
A.
long
B.
longest
C.
longer
D.
the longest
D. the longest

Question 21
The train____________half an hour ago.
A.
had left
B.
has been leaving
C.
left
D.
was leaving
A. had left

Question 22
Opening our branch office in one of the less crowded areas of the city would be more beneficial for our employees and less costly_______moving downtown.
A.
than
B.
but
C.
while
D.
and
A. than

Question 23
All operators of heavy machinery at Steel Inc. are required to follow the safety regulations listed on the wall_______each work station.
A.
from
B. at

Question 23
All operators of heavy machinery at Steel Inc. are required to follow the safety regulations listed on the wall_______each work station.
A.
from
B.
with
C.
beside
D.
of
B. with

Question 24
In the case of flight delays or_______unexpected changes in schedules, the meeting will be moved to a more suitable time.
A.
another
B.
any other
C.
others
D.
one another
A. another

Question 25
The deadline for this month's articles for Fame Magazine has been_______to August 30.
A.
progressed
B.
finished
C.
extended
D.
opened
C. extended

Question 26
A number of new programmers will start on Monday, so please address them_______to make them feel part of the team.
A.
commonly
B.
exceptionally
C.
personally
D.
essentially
C. personally

Question 27
_______is a person who reads a report in the program.
A.
A newsreader
B.
A weatherman
C.
A guest
D.
A comedian
A. A newsreader

Question 28
Kitchen Supplies guarantee that orders will be delivered_______three weeks time.
A.
nearby
B.
during
C.
sometime
D.
within
D. within
